vivid/color/text.$description: A default text color used for primary text content.

vivid/color/text/secondary.$description: Use for text with a secondary level of prominence.

vivid/color/text/disabled.$description: A disabled text color used for non-interactive text content.

vivid/color/text/link.$description: A text color used for interactive link elements in their default resting state.

vivid/color/text/link/hover.$description: A text color used for interactive link elements when hovered.

vivid/color/text/link/active.$description: A text color used for interactive link elements when pressed or active.

vivid/color/text/link/visited.$description: A text color used for previously visited link elements in their default resting state.

vivid/color/text/link/visited/hover.$description: A text color used for previously visited link elements when hovered.

vivid/color/text/link/visited/active.$description: A text color used for previously visited link elements when pressed or active.

vivid/color/text/on-inverse.$description: A text color used for high contrast content on dark backgrounds, overlays, or inverse surfaces.

vivid/color/text/primary/strong.$description: A primary text color used to communicate brand presence and highlight key content.

vivid/color/text/primary.$description: A primary text color used to communicate brand presence and highlight key content.

vivid/color/text/primary/on-strong.$description: A text color for use on primary strong fill elements to ensure accessible contrast.

vivid/color/text/announcement/strong.$description: An accent text color used to highlight new features, announcements, or secondary branded content.

vivid/color/text/announcement.$description: An accent text color used to highlight new features, announcements, or secondary branded content.

vivid/color/text/announcement/on-strong.$description: A text color for use on announcement strong fill elements to ensure accessible contrast.

vivid/color/text/info/strong.$description: An informational text color used to highlight info states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/info.$description: An informational text color used to highlight info states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/info/on-strong.$description: A text color for use on info strong fill elements to ensure accessible contrast.

vivid/color/text/danger/strong.$description: A danger text color used to highlight danger states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/danger.$description: A danger text color used to highlight danger states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/danger/on-strong.$description: A text color for use on danger strong fill elements to ensure accessible contrast.

vivid/color/text/warning/strong.$description: A warning text color used to highlight warning states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/warning.$description: A warning text color used to highlight warning states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/warning/on-strong.$description: A text color for use on warning strong fill elements to ensure accessible contrast.

vivid/color/text/success/strong.$description: A success text color used to highlight success states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/success.$description: A success text color used to highlight success states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/success/on-strong.$description: A text color for use on success strong fill elements to ensure accessible contrast.
